new_value:
{"description":"Systematic closure of feature gaps identified in the coding agent feature matrix (docs/research/coding-agent-feature-matrix.md). Prioritized by how many competitors already ship the feature. Updated 2026-03-12 after deep research refresh of all 5 competitors.

## Critical Gaps (4+ competitors have, Skaffen doesn't)
- Hook system — CC (17), Codex (5), Gemini (11), OpenCode (28), Amp (2)
- Context compaction — CC, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode (manual + auto)
- Skills/instruction files — CC (CLAUDE.md), Codex (AGENTS.md), Gemini, OpenCode, Amp
- Subagents — CC (5+ built-in), Codex (6 threads), Gemini (4+), OpenCode (4+), Amp (6)
- External editor — CC, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Amp (Ctrl+G or similar)
- Shell escape (! prefix) — CC, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Amp
- Sandbox/isolation — CC (Seatbelt/bwrap), Codex (4 platforms), Gemini (4 backends)
- Image support — CC, Codex, Gemini, Amp; OpenCode partial
- Web search tool — CC, Codex, Gemini, Amp
- Skills system (SKILL.md) — CC, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Amp

## High Priority (2-3 competitors have)
- Custom slash commands — CC, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode
- Vim mode — CC (full), Gemini (/vim)
- History search (Ctrl+R) — CC, Gemini, Amp
- Session forking — CC, Codex, OpenCode
- Per-project config — CC, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Amp
- VS Code extension — CC, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode
- Plan mode — CC, Codex, Gemini, Amp
- PR review tools — CC, Codex, Amp
- Custom keybindings — CC, Gemini, OpenCode

## Medium Priority
- Split panes / sidebar (OpenCode)
- Cloud sync (Amp, CC web, Codex cloud)
- Desktop app (CC, Codex, OpenCode)
- Memory system (CC, Codex, Amp)
- Secret redaction (Gemini, Amp)
- Auto-formatting (OpenCode)
- Session export (CC, OpenCode)

## Low Priority
- Agent teams (CC only)
- Browser agent (Gemini only)
- A2A protocol (Gemini only)
- Image generation (Codex, Amp)

## Reference
- Feature matrix: docs/research/coding-agent-feature-matrix.md
- Deep-dive docs: docs/research/2026-03-12-*-feature-inventory.md"}

{"id":"Demarch-6i0","title":"Bridge competitive landscape gaps in Skaffen TUI","description":"Systematic closure of feature gaps identified in the coding agent feature matrix (docs/research/coding-agent-feature-matrix.md). Prioritized by how many competitors already ship the feature.

## High Priority (most competitors have, Skaffen doesn't)
- Context files (SKAFFEN.md) — every competitor
- Hook system — Claude Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode
- Context compaction — Claude Code, Codex CLI
- Custom slash commands — Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI
- Vim mode / external editor — Claude Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode
- History search (Ctrl+R) — Claude Code
- Shell escape (! prefix) — Claude Code, Gemini CLI
- Sandbox / isolation — Codex CLI, Gemini CLI
- Shortcuts help panel — Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, OpenCode

## Medium Priority
- Per-project config (.skaffen/ directory)
- Image support (@image references)
- Web search tool
- Session forking
- VS Code extension
- Split panes / sidebar

## Low Priority
- Cloud sync
- Desktop app
- Repo map / tree-sitter

## Reference
- Feature matrix: docs/research/coding-agent-feature-matrix.md
- Source research: docs/research/2026-03-11-*.md","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"mistakeknot@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T19:30:42Z","created_by":"mistakeknot","updated_at":"2026-03-12T19:30:42Z"}

{"id":"Demarch-6i0.6","title":"External editor support (Ctrl+G)","description":"Claude Code (Ctrl+G), Gemini CLI (Ctrl+X), and OpenCode support opening prompt in $EDITOR.

- Keybinding: Ctrl+G opens current prompt text in $EDITOR
- On save+exit, prompt is updated with editor content
- Supports multi-line composition for complex prompts
- Fallback if EDITOR unset: vi → nano","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mistakeknot@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T19:31:36Z","created_by":"mistakeknot","updated_at":"2026-03-12T19:31:36Z"}

new_value: {"description":"5 competitors support shell escape: CC (! prefix), Codex (! prefix), Gemini (! prefix), OpenCode (! prefix), Amp (dollar prefix). Now critical tier — all competitors have this.","priority":1}
old_value:
{"id":"Demarch-6i0.8","title":"Shell escape (! prefix)","description":"Claude Code and Gemini CLI support ! prefix to run shell commands inline, adding output to context.

- !git status runs command, shows output, adds to conversation context
- Useful for injecting build/test output without tool approval
- Output rendered in viewport with shell styling
- Does not count as agent tool use","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mistakeknot@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T19:31:37Z","created_by":"mistakeknot","updated_at":"2026-03-12T19:31:37Z"}

new_value: {"description":"3 competitors have OS-level sandboxing: CC (Seatbelt + bwrap + network proxy), Codex (Seatbelt + Landlock+seccomp + bwrap + Windows), Gemini (Seatbelt + Docker/Podman + gVisor + LXC). Critical for enterprise adoption.","priority":1}
old_value:
{"id":"Demarch-6i0.10","title":"Sandbox / tool isolation","description":"Codex CLI has Rust-based network+filesystem sandbox. Gemini CLI uses macOS Seatbelt or Docker/Podman. Skaffen runs tools unsandboxed.

- Filesystem sandbox: restrict writes to project directory
- Network sandbox: block outbound by default, allow-list for tools that need it
- Implementation options: Linux namespaces, seccomp, or Docker wrapper
- Configurable per-tool or per-phase","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mistakeknot@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T19:31:55Z","created_by":"mistakeknot","updated_at":"2026-03-12T19:31:55Z"}

new_value: {"description":"4+ competitors support images: CC (clipboard paste Ctrl+V + @ref + PDF up to 20 pages), Codex (-i flag PNG/JPEG), Gemini (inline images), Amp (paste + @ref + look_at tool + PDF). Now critical tier.","priority":1}
old_value:
{"id":"Demarch-6i0.12","title":"Image support (@image references)","description":"Claude Code supports Ctrl+V paste and @image.png references. Gemini CLI supports inline images. Skaffen is text-only.

- @image.png in prompt sends image to vision-capable models
- Supported formats: PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP
- File size limit with warning
- Base64 encoding for API submission
- Graceful error if model doesn't support vision","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mistakeknot@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T19:31:56Z","created_by":"mistakeknot","updated_at":"2026-03-12T19:31:56Z"}

{"id":"Demarch-6i0.11","title":"Per-project config directory (.skaffen/)","description":"Most competitors have per-project config dirs (.claude/, .codex/, .gemini/, .opencode/). Skaffen only has global ~/.skaffen/.

- .skaffen/ directory in project root
- routing.json override for project-specific model routing
- plugins.toml override for project-specific MCP servers
- hooks.toml for project-specific hooks
- commands/ for project-specific slash commands
- Merge strategy: project overrides global","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mistakeknot@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T19:31:56Z","created_by":"mistakeknot","updated_at":"2026-03-12T19:31:56Z"}

{"id":"iv-ia66","title":"[flux-drive-spec] Phase 2: Extract domain detection library","description":"Extract detect-domains.py + domain profiles into the flux-drive-spec library as portable Python modules.

Work items:
- Extract detect-domains.py (696 lines) into lib/domains.py as pure functions (no CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT dependency)
- Move config/flux-drive/domains/index.yaml + 11 domain .md files into domains/ directory
- Make detection configurable: accept domain index path as parameter, not hardcoded
- Extract 3-tier staleness checking (hash → git → mtime) into reusable cache module
- Port the 32 existing unit tests, add integration tests
- Define stable API: detect(project_path, domains_config) → ranked list of (domain, confidence)

Already a standalone script so this is the cleanest extraction target.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mistakeknot@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:46:46Z","created_by":"mk","updated_at":"2026-02-13T22:46:46Z","metadata":""\"\\\"\\\\\\\"{}\\\\\\\"\\\"\""","work_type":"mutex"}

CLI wiring complete: all 6 Mycroft commands (run, status, shadows, pause, resume, override) wired to v0.1 packages
PruneOlderThan added to Dispatcher with prune CLI command and tests

Owned by Interspect scope.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mistakeknot@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-10T15:29:07Z","created_by":"mistakeknot","updated_at":"2026-03-10T15:29:07Z"}
